name: Large Storage Bins White 4ct, Teacher Supplies - up&up™
description:
This 4-Pack Large Storage Bins from up&up™ will help keep your home or classroom effortlessly organized. Made from plastic, these large bins are great for storing craft supplies, small books and much more. Plus, they're designed in a solid white hue for easy integration with existing decor.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
